basic_details.job_title: SMC Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 80 Electrical Wireman, Assistant Architect and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Director (IT) (Sr. No. 1, 01 post) and Departmental Inquiry Officer (Sr. No. 2, 01 post) have been cancelled via Advertisement No. PRO/75, dated 16/06/2026.

important_dates.document verification date: To be notified on SMC website
important_dates.interview_date: To be notified via website & SMS

application_fee.payment_mode: Online only (Debit Card / Credit Card / Net Banking)
application_fee.details: The application fee must be paid online only. Cash, Demand Draft, Postal Order, or Pay Order payments are not accepted. Bank charges levied during online payment are to be borne by the applicant. | Important: Once the online fee is paid, it is non-refundable under any circumstances. If a candidate submits the form again using the re-apply option, the earlier form is cancelled but the fee already paid is not refunded.

age_limit.details: Age is reckoned as on the last date for online application (06 July 2026). The upper age limit varies by post and must not exceed the prescribed limit even after relaxation. | Candidates wondering about age relaxation can note that reserved category (SC, ST, SEBC, EWS) candidates who are original Gujarat domicile residents are eligible for age relaxation as per prevailing government rules, but the upper age limit after relaxation must not exceed 45 years. Regular employees of Surat Municipal Corporation are exempt from the upper age limit. SMC trainees (on fixed monthly stipend) are subject to the age limit rules.

qualification.details: Each post carries specific educational qualifications and age limits. Candidates must fully satisfy the eligibility conditions before submitting their application, as experience gained before obtaining the required educational degree/qualification will not be considered valid. | 1. Director (Information Technology) - Cancelled | Education: Postgraduate degree in Computer / Electronics / Electronics & Communication / Information & Communication Technology / Electronics & Telecommunication / Computer Science / Information Technology Engineering from a recognized university/institute. Experience: 9 years' experience after postgraduate degree in a government/semi-government organization in a post with pay scale of ₹8,000–13,500/-, involving Information Technology work. | 2. Departmental Enquiry Officer - Cancelled | Education: Bachelor's degree in Law (LLB) from a recognized university. Experience: Minimum 10 years' experience after obtaining degree in Labour Court, Industrial Tribunal, Conciliation, etc. Candidates with experience as Arbitrator will be given preference. Additional: Must have basic computer knowledge; knowledge of Gujarati and Hindi languages is required. | 3. Administrative Officer | Education: Postgraduate degree in any stream from a recognized university. Experience: 7 years' experience in administrative work in any government/semi-government organization, Municipal Corporation, Board, or Corporation. | 4. Assistant Architect | Education: B.E. (Civil) or Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) from a recognized university, plus a postgraduate degree or diploma in City Planning / Regional Planning / Urban Design from a recognized university/institute, OR membership of the Town Planners' Association after passing its examination. Additional: Must have basic computer knowledge; knowledge of Gujarati and Hindi languages is required. | 5. Senior Swimming Pool Instructor - Cancelled | Education: Bachelor's degree in any stream from a recognized university/institute AND a 10-month regular Swimming Course conducted by Sports Authority of India / Netaji Subhash Institute of Sports. Additional: Must have completed first aid training with certificate from a recognized organization. Preference to candidates who have participated in state/national level swimming competitions, or those who have served as Life Saver/Swimming Coach with SMC on honorarium basis. | 6. Junior Swimming Pool Instructor - Cancelled | Education: Bachelor's degree in any stream AND a 6-week Certificate Course in Swimming conducted by Sports Authority of India / Netaji Subhash Institute of Sports, with 5 years' swimming experience. Additional: First aid training certificate required. Preference to state/national level swimmers or those who have served as Life Saver/Swimming Coach with SMC. | 7. Junior Lady Swimming Pool Instructor - Cancelled | Same qualifications as Junior Swimming Pool Instructor. Female candidates only. | 8. Electrical Wireman | Education: ITI Electrician OR Second Class Wireman examination pass. Experience: 3 years' experience as Electrical Wireman. Additional: Knowledge as Cable Jointer for HT/LT Switch Gear work. Priority given to those with specialized skills or higher qualifications/experience.

category_wise_vacancy.Post Name: Junior Lady Swimming Pool Instructor - Cancelled

salary_details.details: SMC offers competitive pay scales aligned with the state government pay matrix. For Swimming Pool Instructor posts and Electrical Wireman, a fixed monthly training stipend of ₹16,500/– (Junior) or ₹17,500/– (Senior) applies for the first three years.

selection_process: The selection for SMC Recruitment 2026 will be conducted in stages as determined by the appointing authority. For Post No. 1 (Director IT)
the Standing Committee will finalize the waitlist; for Posts 2 to 8
the Appointment Authority will determine the final selection criteria based on basic qualification and/or experience.
The selection may include any combination of the following
Written Test (objective/descriptive as applicable) Practical Test Oral Interview / Viva Voce Document Verification Physical Fitness Test (where applicable)

Candidates will be notified via their registered mobile number (SMS) and through call letters published on the SMC website. All candidates must attend at their own expense at the venue specified by the appointing authority.
Tie-breaking rule: If two or more candidates score equal marks
the older candidate (by date of birth) gets priority in the merit list. If both marks and date of birth are equal
priority is given based on educational merit.
how_to_apply: Only online applications submitted through the SMC website will be accepted. Candidates should read the detailed notification PDF for their cadre carefully before applying.
Visit https://www.suratmunicipal.gov.in between 22 June 2026 (11:00 AM) and 06 July 2026 (11:00 PM).

User Registration (First-time users): Enter your Email Address, Mobile Number, and the displayed Captcha, then click Next. Verify the OTP sent to your mobile number. Enter your First Name, Last Name, create a Password, and click Submit to complete sign-up. Verify your email address by clicking the link sent to your registered email.
Enter your Email Address, Mobile Number, and the displayed Captcha, then click Next.
Verify the OTP sent to your mobile number.
Enter your First Name, Last Name, create a Password, and click Submit to complete sign-up.
Verify your email address by clicking the link sent to your registered email.
Login using your registered email/mobile and password.
Complete User Profile: Enter personal details (name, date of birth as per school leaving certificate), current and permanent address, Aadhaar card number, and language proficiency.
Click HOME, then click Apply Now against the relevant cadre.

Fill Application Form: Personal Details (mandatory fields marked with red asterisk) Educational Qualification details Experience Details (as per experience certificates only) Document Details (tick all documents you possess)
Personal Details (mandatory fields marked with red asterisk)
Educational Qualification details
Experience Details (as per experience certificates only)
Document Details (tick all documents you possess)
Upload Photo and Signature: Photo: JPG/JPEG/PNG, max 150 KB, size 5 cm × 3.6 cm Signature: JPG/JPEG/PNG, max 50 KB, size 2.5 cm × 7.5 cm (sign on white paper in black/blue ink)
Photo: JPG/JPEG/PNG, max 150 KB, size 5 cm × 3.6 cm
Signature: JPG/JPEG/PNG, max 50 KB, size 2.5 cm × 7.5 cm (sign on white paper in black/blue ink)
Preview the application form; make corrections if needed via Edit Application option.
Click Confirm & Pay → verify details → click Proceed to Pay → select payment method and pay the fee.
Download and print the payment receipt and application form confirmation. An SMS will be sent to your registered mobile number confirming submission.

Existing government/semi-government employees must send a hard copy of the application through proper channel (via their department) to the Central Recruitment Department of SMC within 7 working days after the last application date
Note: Once a form is finally submitted and payment is made, no changes can be made to the application. The fee paid is non-refundable.

content_sections.heading: SMC Recruitment 2026 - Quick Summary
content_sections.text: Download Surat Municipal Corporation (SMC) Recruitment 2026 Official Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: SMC Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
content_sections.text: Candidates must note the complete schedule before applying. The application portal opens at 11:00 AM on 22 June 2026 and closes sharp at 11:00 PM on 06 July 2026 . No applications submitted outside this window will be accepted.

rows.date_time: To be notified on SMC website
To be notified via website & SMS

content_sections.heading: Vacancy Details – Post-Wise & Category-Wise Breakdown
content_sections.text: SMC has announced vacancies across 8 posts with category-wise distribution as follows. The total vacancy count across all cadres is 80 , with specific reservations for SC, ST, SEBC (Socially and Educationally Backward Class), General/Unreserved, and EWS (Economically Weaker Section) categories. Additionally, out of the Senior Swimming Pool Instructor posts, 1 post is reserved for PwD (Divyangjan) ; out of Junior Swimming Pool Instructor posts, 1 post is reserved for PwD ; and out of Electrical Wireman posts, 8 posts are reserved for PwD . Reserved category vacancies are applicable only to original Gujarat domicile candidates of the respective reserved categories. Candidates from reserved categories may apply for unreserved posts, but selection criteria for unreserved posts will apply.

rows.post_name: Junior Lady Swimming Pool Instructor - Cancelled

content_sections.heading: SMC Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Each post carries specific educational qualifications and age limits. Candidates must fully satisfy the eligibility conditions before submitting their application, as experience gained before obtaining the required educational degree/qualification will not be considered valid. 1. Director (Information Technology) - Cancelled Education: Postgraduate degree in Computer / Electronics / Electronics & Communication / Information & Communication Technology / Electronics & Telecommunication / Computer Science / Information Technology Engineering from a recognized university/institute. Experience: 9 years' experience after postgraduate degree in a government/semi-government organization in a post with pay scale of ₹8,000–13,500/-, involving Information Technology work. 2. Departmental Enquiry Officer - Cancelled Education: Bachelor's degree in Law (LLB) from a recognized university. Experience: Minimum 10 years' experience after obtaining degree in Labour Court, Industrial Tribunal, Conciliation, etc. Candidates with experience as Arbitrator will be given preference. Additional: Must have basic computer knowledge; knowledge of Gujarati and Hindi languages is required. 3. Administrative Officer Education: Postgraduate degree in any stream from a recognized university. Experience: 7 years' experience in administrative work in any government/semi-government organization, Municipal Corporation, Board, or Corporation. 4. Assistant Architect Education: B.E. (Civil) or Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) from a recognized university, plus a postgraduate degree or diploma in City Planning / Regional Planning / Urban Design from a recognized university/institute, OR membership of the Town Planners' Association after passing its examination. Additional: Must have basic computer knowledge; knowledge of Gujarati and Hindi languages is required. 5. Senior Swimming Pool Instructor - Cancelled Education: Bachelor's degree in any stream from a recognized university/institute AND a 10-month regular Swimming Course conducted by Sports Authority of India / Netaji Subhash Institute of Sports. Additional: Must have completed first aid training with certificate from a recognized organization. Preference to candidates who have participated in state/national level swimming competitions, or those who have served as Life Saver/Swimming Coach with SMC on honorarium basis. 6. Junior Swimming Pool Instructor - Cancelled Education: Bachelor's degree in any stream AND a 6-week Certificate Course in Swimming conducted by Sports Authority of India / Netaji Subhash Institute of Sports, with 5 years' swimming experience. Additional: First aid training certificate required. Preference to state/national level swimmers or those who have served as Life Saver/Swimming Coach with SMC. 7. Junior Lady Swimming Pool Instructor - Cancelled Same qualifications as Junior Swimming Pool Instructor. Female candidates only. 8. Electrical Wireman Education: ITI Electrician OR Second Class Wireman examinati

content_sections.heading: SMC Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Age is reckoned as on the last date for online application (06 July 2026) . The upper age limit varies by post and must not exceed the prescribed limit even after relaxation. Candidates wondering about age relaxation can note that reserved category (SC, ST, SEBC, EWS) candidates who are original Gujarat domicile residents are eligible for age relaxation as per prevailing government rules, but the upper age limit after relaxation must not exceed 45 years . Regular employees of Surat Municipal Corporation are exempt from the upper age limit . SMC trainees (on fixed monthly stipend) are subject to the age limit rules.

content_sections.heading: SMC Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee
content_sections.text: The application fee must be paid online only. Cash, Demand Draft, Postal Order, or Pay Order payments are not accepted. Bank charges levied during online payment are to be borne by the applicant. Important : Once the online fee is paid, it is non-refundable under any circumstances. If a candidate submits the form again using the re-apply option, the earlier form is cancelled but the fee already paid is not refunded.

rows.category: Reserved Categories (All categories of women, SEBC, EWS, SC, ST, PwD/Divyangjan)

rows.application_fee: Online only (Debit Card / Credit Card / Net Banking)

content_sections.heading: SMC Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Pay Scale
content_sections.text: SMC offers competitive pay scales aligned with the state government pay matrix. For Swimming Pool Instructor posts and Electrical Wireman, a fixed monthly training stipend of ₹16,500/– (Junior) or ₹17,500/– (Senior) applies for the first three years.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: The selection for SMC Recruitment 2026 will be conducted in stages as determined by the appointing authority. For Post No. 1 (Director IT), the Standing Committee will finalize the waitlist; for Posts 2 to 8, the Appointment Authority will determine the final selection criteria based on basic qualification and/or experience. The selection may include any combination of the following, depending on the post: Written Test (objective/descriptive as applicable) Practical Test Oral Interview / Viva Voce Document Verification Physical Fitness Test (where applicable) Candidates will be notified via their registered mobile number (SMS) and through call letters published on the SMC website. All candidates must attend at their own expense at the venue specified by the appointing authority. Tie-breaking rule: If two or more candidates score equal marks, the older candidate (by date of birth) gets priority in the merit list. If both marks and date of birth are equal, priority is given based on educational merit.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply – Step-by-Step Process
content_sections.text: Only online applications submitted through the SMC website will be accepted. Candidates should read the detailed notification PDF for their cadre carefully before applying. Visit https://www.suratmunicipal.gov.in between 22 June 2026 (11:00 AM) and 06 July 2026 (11:00 PM) . User Registration (First-time users): Enter your Email Address, Mobile Number, and the displayed Captcha, then click Next . Verify the OTP sent to your mobile number. Enter your First Name, Last Name, create a Password, and click Submit to complete sign-up. Verify your email address by clicking the link sent to your registered email. Login using your registered email/mobile and password. Complete User Profile: Enter personal details (name, date of birth as per school leaving certificate), current and permanent address, Aadhaar card number, and language proficiency. Click HOME , then click Apply Now against the relevant cadre. Fill Application Form: Personal Details (mandatory fields marked with red asterisk) Educational Qualification details Experience Details (as per experience certificates only) Document Details (tick all documents you possess) Upload Photo and Signature: Photo: JPG/JPEG/PNG, max 150 KB, size 5 cm × 3.6 cm Signature: JPG/JPEG/PNG, max 50 KB, size 2.5 cm × 7.5 cm (sign on white paper in black/blue ink) Preview the application form; make corrections if needed via Edit Application option. Click Confirm & Pay → verify details → click Proceed to Pay → select payment method and pay the fee. Download and print the payment receipt and application form confirmation. An SMS will be sent to your registered mobile number confirming submission. Existing government/semi-government employees must send a hard copy of the application through proper channel (via their department) to the Central Recruitment Department of SMC within 7 working days after the last application date Note: Once a form is finally submitted and payment is made, no changes can be made to the application. The fee paid is non-refundable.

content_sections.heading: Important Documents Required
content_sections.text: Candidates must have the following documents ready for upload/verification. At the time of document verification, originals and one attested photocopy of each must be presented. Age proof: School Leaving Certificate or Secondary/Higher Secondary Board Certificate Educational qualification: Mark sheets, degree certificate, attempt certificate, registration certificate Caste certificate (SC/ST/SEBC/EWS) from competent authority of Gujarat Government - issued on or after 01 April 2024 (for SEBC non-creamy layer); must have certificate number and issue date Non-Creamy Layer Certificate: Valid for three financial years including the year of issue; certificates issued before 01 April 2024 or after the last date of application are not valid for this recruitment EWS certificate: Issued up to the last date of application; valid for three years from issue date PwD certificate and UDID card (for Divyangjan candidates) - disability must be 40% or more Experience certificate: On organization's letterhead with competent authority signature, specifying duration (days/months/years), designation, nature of work, and monthly salary - offer/appointment letters alone are not accepted No Objection Certificate (NOC) from current employer if working in government/semi-government organization EPIC Card, PAN Card, Aadhaar Card copies Marriage Registration Certificate or Government Gazette (for married women applying under husband's name) CCC/CCC+ computer examination certificate (for Posts 1–3: CCC+; Posts 4–8: CCC) - must be passed within 1 year of appointment if not already completed

content_sections.heading: Disability (PwD / Divyangjan) Reservation – Key Points
content_sections.text: Reservations for PwD candidates apply specifically to Post No. 5 (1 seat), Post No. 6 (1 seat), and Post No. 8 (8 seats). Candidates with a disability of 40% or more are eligible to apply under the PwD category. The five types of recognized disabilities are: (A) Blindness or Low Vision, (B) Deaf and Hard of Hearing, (C) Locomotor disability including Cerebral Palsy, Leprosy Cured, Dwarfism, Acid Attack Victims, and Muscular Dystrophy, (D) Autism Spectrum Disorder, Intellectual Disability, Specific Learning Disability, and Mental Illness, and (E) Multiple Disabilities involving two or more of the above. Specific disability type eligibility is listed per post as per the notification.

content_sections.heading: Common Mistakes to Avoid
content_sections.text: Even well-prepared applicants can face rejection due to avoidable errors during the online application. Keep these points in mind: Photo/Signature size errors are the most common reason for failed uploads. Ensure the photo is within 150 KB and signature within 50 KB. If files exceed limits, reduce the scanner DPI resolution and re-scan. Using the wrong name format: Name and date of birth in the form must match your School Leaving Certificate exactly - not your Aadhaar card or other documents. Submitting experience by offer/appointment letter alone: Only experience certificates on organizational letterhead with salary details are valid. Offer letters are not accepted. Changing mobile number/email after applying: All recruitment communications, call letters, and SMS alerts go to the registered mobile and email. Keep these active throughout the entire recruitment process. Applying on the last day: Server traffic is highest near the deadline. Submit your application well in advance to avoid gateway timeouts. Incomplete payment: If the payment gateway fails, check whether the amount was debited before retrying. Confirm with your bank before making a second payment attempt. Not keeping payment receipt: Download and print the payment receipt immediately after successful payment - it is your proof of fee submission. Grade/GPA conversion: If your mark sheet shows grades instead of percentage, you must submit a conversion certificate from your university. Without this, the qualification may not be accepted.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Surat Municipal Corporation Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application is 06 July 2026 at 11:00 PM. Applications must be submitted through the official SMC website at www.suratmunicipal.gov.in.

faq.question: Q2. How many posts are available in SMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Surat Municipal Corporation has announced 80 vacancies across 3 post categories: Administrative Officer, Assistant Architect, and Electrical Wireman.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for SMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: General/unreserved candidates must pay ₹500/-. Candidates from reserved categories (all women, SEBC, EWS, SC, ST, and PwD/Divyangjan) must pay ₹400/-. Payment is accepted online only through debit card, credit card, or net banking. The fee is non-refundable.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for SMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The upper age limit ranges from 35 years (Assistant Architect, Senior Swimming Pool Instructor) to 45 years (Director IT, Departmental Enquiry Officer, Administrative Officer) depending on the post. Age is calculated as on 06 July 2026. Regular SMC employees are exempt from the age limit.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for SMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection may include a written test, practical test, oral interview/viva voce, physical fitness test, and document verification. The specific stages for each post will be decided by the Appointment Authority and communicated through call letters on the SMC website and via SMS.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for the Director IT post in SMC 2026?
faq.answer: The Director (Information Technology) post carries a pay scale of ₹10,000–15,200/- (Pay Band ₹15,600–39,100, Grade Pay ₹6,600/-, Pay Matrix Level-11).

faq.question: Q7. Can candidates from other states apply for SMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates from other states can apply for unreserved (General) posts. However, reserved category vacancies (SC, ST, SEBC, EWS) are applicable only to original Gujarat domicile candidates of the respective reserved categories.

faq.question: Q8. Is the Electrical Wireman post reserved for PwD candidates?
faq.answer: Yes. Out of 69 Electrical Wireman posts, 8 posts are reserved for PwD (Divyangjan) candidates. The eligible disability types for this post include Deaf/Hard of Hearing, One Arm, One Leg, Leprosy Cured, Dwarfism, Acid Attack Victims, Autism Spectrum Disorder (Mild), Specific Learning Disability, Mental Illness, and Multiple Disabilities (involving eligible types).

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required for the SMC 2026 application?
faq.answer: Key documents include age proof (School Leaving Certificate), educational mark sheets and degree certificates, caste certificate (for reserved categories), non-creamy layer certificate (for SEBC), experience certificate on institutional letterhead, PwD/UDID certificate (if applicable), and EPIC Card, PAN Card, and Aadhaar Card copies.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I apply for Surat Municipal Corporation Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official recruitment portal is https://www.suratmunicipal.gov.in. Applications are accepted exclusively online through this website from 22 June 2026 to 06 July 2026.

title: SMC Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 80 Electrical Wireman, Assistant Architect and More Posts
